revision.comment: Revised to used new optional parameters feature and if templates. ''Title'' is the only mandatory operator. If something goes horribly wrong, I'll revert.

                   }}
          }}
 }}

revision.comment: Added Authorlink functionality, as per Book reference template
revision.text: <cite style="font-style:normal" {{if|1={{{Ref|}}}|2=id="{{{Ref}}}"|3={{if|1={{{Last|}}}|2={{if|1={{{Year|}}}|2=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"}}}}}} >{{if|{{{Authorlink|}}}|{{wikilink|{{{Authorlink}}}|{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}}}|{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}}}{{if|{{{Date|}}}| ({{{Date}}})|{{if|{{{Year|}}}|{{if|{{{Month|}}}| ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})| ({{{Year}}})}}}}}}{{if|{{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}|. }}{{if|1={{{URL|}}}|2=[{{{URL}}}|3=}} {{{Title}}}{{if|1={{{URL|}}}|2=]|3=}}{{if|{{{Journal|}}}|, ''{{{Journal}}}''}}{{if|{{{Volume|}}}|, {{{Volume}}}}}{{if|{{{Issue|}}}|({{{Issue}}})}}{{if|{{{Pages|}}}|<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}}}</cite>

<cite style="font-style:normal" {{if
  |1={{{Ref|}}}
  |2={{ifnone
       |1={{{Ref|}}}
       |2=
       |3=id="{{{Ref}}}"
  |3={{if
       |1={{{Last|}}}
       |2={{if
            |1={{{Year|}}}
            |2=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
            }}
       }}
  }}>{{if|{{{Authorlink|}}}|{{wikilink|{{{Authorlink}}}|{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}}}|{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}}}{{if|{{{Date|}}}| ({{{Date}}})|{{if|{{{Year|}}}|{{if|{{{Month|}}}| ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})| ({{{Year}}})}}}}}}{{if|{{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}|. }}{{if|1={{{URL|}}}|2=[{{{URL}}}|3=}} {{{Title}}}{{if|1={{{URL|}}}|2=]|3=}}{{if|{{{Journal|}}}|, ''{{{Journal}}}''}}{{if|{{{Volume|}}}|, {{{Volume}}}}}{{if|{{{Issue|}}}|({{{Issue}}})}}{{if|{{{Pages|}}}|<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}}}</cite>

revision.comment: Full-stop added at the end; Optional parameters notice copied from [[Template:Book reference]]
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal" {{if
  |1={{{Ref|}}}
  |2={{ifnone
       |1={{{Ref}}}
       |2=
       |3=id="{{{Ref}}}"
     }}
  |3={{if
       |1={{{Last|}}}
       |2={{if
            |1={{{Year|}}}
            |2=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
          }}
     }}
}}>{{if
  |{{{Authorlink|}}}
  |{{wikilink
     |{{{Authorlink}}}
     |{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
   }}
  |{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Date|}}}
  | ({{{Date}}})
  |{{if
    |{{{Year|}}}
    |{{if
      |{{{Month|}}}
      | ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      | ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{if
  |{{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |. 
}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=[{{{URL}}}
  |3=
}} {{{Title}}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=]
  |3=
}}{{if
  |{{{Journal|}}}
  |, ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{if
  |{{{Volume|}}}
  |, {{{Volume}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Issue|}}}
  |({{{Issue}}})
}}{{if
  |{{{Pages|}}}
  |<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{notice|This template has several '''''optional''''' parameters: see [[Template talk:Journal reference#Usage|the talk page]] for details.
----
This template employs some extremely complicated and esoteric features of template syntax.
Please do not attempt to alter it unless you are certain you understand what is going on '''and''' are prepared to repair any consequent collateral damage if it all goes terribly wrong.}}
</noinclude>

<cite style="font-style:normal" {{if
  |1={{{Ref|}}}
  |2={{if
       |1={{booleq
            |{{{Ref}}}
            |none
          }}
       |2=
       |3=id="{{{Ref}}}"
     }}
  |3={{if
       |1={{booland
           |1={{{Last|}}}
           |2={{{Year|}}}
       }}
       |2=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
     }}
}}>{{if
  |{{{Authorlink|}}}
  |{{wikilink
     |{{{Authorlink}}}
     |{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
   }}
  |{{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Date|}}}
  | ({{{Date}}})
  |{{if
    |{{{Year|}}}
    |{{if
      |{{{Month|}}}
      | ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      | ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{if
  |{{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |. 
}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=[{{{URL}}}
  |3=
}} {{{Title}}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=]
  |3=
}}{{if
  |{{{Journal|}}}
  |, ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{if
  |{{{Volume|}}}
  |, {{{Volume}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Issue|}}}
  |({{{Issue}}})
}}{{if
  |{{{Pages|}}}
  |<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{if
  |1={{{ID|}}}
  |2=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add Coauthors parameter to make this more similar to {{tl|book reference}}
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal" {{qif
  |test={{{Ref|}}}
  |then={{qif
        |test={{booleq
              |{{{Ref}}}
              |none
              }}
        |then=
        |else=id="{{{Ref}}}"
        }}
  |else={{qif
        |test={{booland
              |1={{{Last|}}}
              |2={{{Year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{Authorlink|}}}
   |then={{wikilink
         |1={{{Authorlink}}}
         |2={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
         }}
   |else={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Coauthors|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>,</nowiki> {{{Coauthors}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Date|}}}
  | ({{{Date}}})
  |{{if
    |{{{Year|}}}
    |{{if
      |{{{Month|}}}
      | ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      | ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{if
  |{{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |. 
}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=[{{{URL}}}
  |3=
}} {{{Title}}}{{if
  |1={{{URL|}}}
  |2=]
  |3=
}}{{if
  |{{{Journal|}}}
  |, ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{if
  |{{{Volume|}}}
  |, {{{Volume}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Issue|}}}
  |({{{Issue}}})
}}{{if
  |{{{Pages|}}}
  |<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{if
  |1={{{ID|}}}
  |2=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: if -> [[template talk:qif|qif]] - qif is the server friendlier variant of if
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal" {{qif
  |test={{{Ref|}}}
  |then={{qif
        |test={{booleq
              |{{{Ref}}}
              |none
              }}
        |then=
        |else=id="{{{Ref}}}"
        }}
  |else={{qif
        |test={{booland
              |1={{{Last|}}}
              |2={{{Year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{Authorlink|}}}
   |then={{wikilink
         |1={{{Authorlink}}}
         |2={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
         }}
   |else={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Coauthors|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>,</nowiki> {{{Coauthors}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|}}}
  |then= ({{{Date}}})
  |else={{qif
    |test={{{Year|}}}
    |then={{qif
      |test={{{Month|}}}
      |then= ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      |else= ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |then=. 
}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=[{{{URL}}}
  |else=
}} {{{Title}}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=]
  |else=
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Journal|}}}
  |then=, ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Volume|}}}
  |then=, {{{Volume}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Issue|}}}
  |then=({{{Issue}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Pages|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{ID|}}}
  |then=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: revert to revision of 18:20, December 20, 2005 UTC by COGDEN (last qif variant). [[WP:AUM]] is rejected and no longer a policy
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal" {{qif
  |test={{{Ref|}}}
  |then={{qif
        |test={{booleq
              |{{{Ref}}}
              |none
              }}
        |then=
        |else=id="{{{Ref}}}"
        }}
  |else={{qif
        |test={{booland
              |1={{{Last|}}}
              |2={{{Year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{Authorlink|}}}
   |then={{wikilink
         |1={{{Authorlink}}}
         |2={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
         }}
   |else={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Coauthors|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>,</nowiki> {{{Coauthors}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|}}}
  |then= ({{{Date}}})
  |else={{qif
    |test={{{Year|}}}
    |then={{qif
      |test={{{Month|}}}
      |then= ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      |else= ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |then=. 
}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=[{{{URL}}}
  |else=
}} {{{Title}}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=]
  |else=
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Journal|}}}
  |then=. ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Volume|}}}
  |then= {{{Volume}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Issue|}}}
  |then= ({{{Issue}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Pages|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{ID|}}}
  |then=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

              |2={{{year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{last}}}-{{{year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{authorlink|}}}
   |then={{wikilink
         |1={{{authorlink}}}
         |2={{{author|{{{last|}}}{{qif|test={{{first|}}}|then=, {{{first}}}}}}}}

  |else={{qif

      |test={{{month|}}}
      |then= ({{{month}}} {{{year}}})
      |else= ({{{year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{author|{{{last|{{{year|}}}}}}}}}
  |then=.

  |test={{{url|}}}
  |then=[{{{url}}}
  |else=
}} {{{title}}}{{qif
  |test={{{url|}}}
  |then=]
  |else=
}}{{qif

  |then=. ''{{{journal}}}''
}}{{qif

}}{{qif

}}{{qif
  |test={{{pages|}}}

</noinclude>

        |then=, {{{first}}}
      }}
      |else={{{author}}}

    |else={{qif
      |test={{{last|}}}

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Journal reference]] to [[Template:Cite journal]]: to history merge
revision.text:
<cite style="font-style:normal" {{qif
  |test={{{Ref|}}}
  |then={{qif
        |test={{booleq
              |{{{Ref}}}
              |none
              }}
        |then=
        |else=id="{{{Ref}}}"
        }}
  |else={{qif
        |test={{booland
              |1={{{Last|}}}
              |2={{{Year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{Authorlink|}}}
   |then={{wikilink
         |1={{{Authorlink}}}
         |2={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
         }}
   |else={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{qif|test={{{First|}}}|then=, {{{First}}}}}}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Coauthors|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>,</nowiki> {{{Coauthors}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Date|}}}
  |then= ({{{Date}}})
  |else={{qif
    |test={{{Year|}}}
    |then={{qif
      |test={{{Month|}}}
      |then= ({{{Month}}} {{{Year}}})
      |else= ({{{Year}}})
     }}
   }}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Author|{{{Last|{{{Year|}}}}}}}}}
  |then=. 
}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=[{{{URL}}}
  |else=
}} {{{Title}}}{{qif
  |test={{{URL|}}}
  |then=]
  |else=
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Journal|}}}
  |then=. ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Volume|}}}
  |then= '''{{{Volume}}}'''
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Issue|}}}
  |then= ({{{Issue}}})
}}{{qif
  |test={{{Pages|}}}
  |then=<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{qif
  |test={{{ID|}}}
  |then=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding "Usage" section, as cite book and cite web have
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if:{{{authorlink|}}} |[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} |{{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} |, {{{first}}} }} |{{{author}}} }}]] |{{#if:{{{last|}}} |{{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} |, {{{first}}} }} |{{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if:{{{coauthors|}}} |, {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) |{{#if:{{{year|}}} |{{#if:{{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}{{{year|}}} |. }}{{#if:{{{url|}}} |[{{{url}}} | }} {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{{title}}}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}{{#if:{{{url|}}} |] | }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format}}}) }}{{#if:{{{journal|}}} |. ''{{{journal}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{volume|}}} | '''{{{volume}}}''' }}{{#if:{{{issue|}}} | ({{{issue}}}) }}{{#if:{{{pages|}}} |: {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{doi|}}} | . [[Digital object identifier|DOI]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi}}} {{{doi}}}] }}{{#if:{{{id|}}} |. {{{id}}} }}{{#if:{{{accessdate|}}} |. Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]] }}. {{esoteric}} == Usage == {| cellpadding="0" cellspacing="6" ! using first, last !! using author |- width="50%" | 
{{cite journal
 | last = 
 | first = 
 | authorlink = 
 | coauthors = 
 | year = 
 | month = 
 | title = '''REQUIRED'''
 | journal = 
 | volume = 
 | issue = 
 | pages = 
 | doi =
 | id = 
 | url =
 | format = 
 | accessdate = 
 }}
| style="vertical-align: top;" | 
{{cite journal
 | author = 
 | year = 
 | month = 
 | title = '''REQUIRED'''
 | journal = 
 | volume = 
 | issue = 
 | pages = 
 | doi =
 | id = 
 | url = 
 | format = 
 | accessdate = 
 }}
|} * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article (internal link) ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': ''[[January 1]], [[2006]]''. Full date of publication. ** '''year''': ''2006''. Year of publication (ignored if the ''date'' field is used). *** '''month''': ''January''. Month of publication (ignored if the ''date'' field is used, or if the ''year'' field is ''not'' used). * '''title''': Title of article. '''''This is the only required parameter. All other parameters are optional.''''' * '''journal''': Name of the journal. * '''volume''': Volume number of the journal in which the article is found * '''issue''': Issue number of the journal in which the article is found * '''pages''': ''45–47'': first page, and optional last page. * '''doi''': [[digital object identifier]]. See also {{tl|doi}} * '''id''': Identifier such as ''{{[[:Template:ISSN|ISSN]]|1111-2220}}'', PMID 15128012 **other suitable id-related templates: {{tl|doi}}, {{tl|US patent}} * '''url''': URL of a copy of the article, if available online. ** '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. revision.comment: adding work as an alias for journal param
Archival parameters - copied from Sandbox according to talk page request
Support semicolon as separator - see [[Template talk:Citation]]
fix default separator using a variant of [[User:droll]]'s fix; see [[Template talk:Cite web#Change in default separator and minor bug]]
add support for translated title - see talk
pp and nopp added, per talk
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 308804582 by [[Special:Contributions/Smith609|Smith609]] ([[User talk:Smith609|talk]]) not currently working correctl
Copy author-mask line from [[Template:Citation]], where it is working... sorry about the initial error.
allow elimination of the last deprecated accessdaymonth and accessmonthday parameters
new author-separator parameter; rm non-functional msm
Check for redundant 'doilabel' parameter to eliminate
Tweak archiving system, per [[Template talk:Citation/core#Error messages]]

<includeonly>{{Citation/core
  |Citation type=Journal
  |AuthorMask = {{{author-mask|{{{authormask|}}}}}}
  |Surname1 = {{{last|{{{surname|{{{last1|{{{surname1|{{{author1|{{{author|{{{authors|{{{author|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname2 = {{{last2|{{{surname2|{{{author2|{{{coauthor|{{{coauthors|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname3 = {{{last3|{{{surname3|{{{author3|}}}}}}}}}

  |Given2 = {{{first2|{{{given2|}}}}}}
  |Given3 = {{{first3|{{{given3|}}}}}}
  |Given4 = {{{first4|{{{given4|}}}}}}
  |Given5 = {{{first5|{{{given5|}}}}}}

  |Given7 = {{{first7|{{{given7|}}}}}}
  |Given8 = {{{first8|{{{given8|}}}}}}
  |Given9 = {{{first9|{{{given9|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink1 = {{{author-link|{{{author1-link|{{{authorlink|{{{authorlink1|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Authorlink2 = {{{author2-link|{{{authorlink2|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink3 = {{{author3-link|{{{authorlink3|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink4 = {{{author4-link|{{{authorlink4|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink5 = {{{author5-link|{{{authorlink5|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink6 = {{{author6-link|{{{authorlink6|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink7 = {{{author7-link|{{{authorlink7|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink8 = {{{author8-link|{{{authorlink8|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink9 = {{{author9-link|{{{authorlink9|}}}}}}
  |Year={{{year|{{    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
             #if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{
                #iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{{year|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{title|}}}
  |TransTitle={{{trans_title|}}}
  |URL={{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{archiveurl}}}|{{{url|}}}}} 
  |Series={{{series|{{{version|}}}}}}
  |Periodical = {{{journal|{{{periodical|{{{magazine|{{{work|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Volume = {{{volume|}}}
  |Issue = {{{issue|{{{number|}}}}}}
  |At = {{
          #if: {{{journal|{{{periodical|{{{magazine|{{{work|}}}}}}}}}}}}
          |{{{pages|{{{page|{{{at|}}}}}}}}}
          |{{
             #if: {{{page|}}}
             |p. {{{page}}}
             |{{
                #if: {{{pages|}}}
                |pp. {{{pages}}}
                |{{{at|}}}
              }}
           }}
        }}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{{chapter|{{{contribution|}}}}}}
  |IncludedWorkURL = {{{chapter-url|{{{chapterurl|{{{contribution-url|}}}}}}}}}
  |Edition = {{{edition|}}}
  |Place = {{{place|{{{location|}}}}}}
  |PublicationPlace = {{{publication-place|{{{place|{{{location|}}}}}}}}}
  |Publisher = {{{publisher|}}}
  |PublicationDate = {{{publication-date|}}}
  |EditorSurname1 = {{{editor-last|{{{editor-surname|{{{editor1-last|{{{editor1-surname|{{{editor|{{{editors|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname2 = {{{editor2-last|{{{editor2-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname3 = {{{editor3-last|{{{editor3-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname4 = {{{editor4-last|{{{editor4-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorGiven1 = {{{editor-first|{{{editor-given|{{{editor1-first|{{{editor1-given|}}}}}}}}}}}}

revision.comment: if |jstor= is specified, no reason to send it into |URL=, since |JSTOR= already provides a link; swap two tests for (presumably) somewhat better performance

revision.comment: treat blank url the same as undefined; requested on talk page
remove redundancy: PMC is already passed to core separately; no need to also put it in the URL
add support for deadurl parameter, per request on talk page
undo change by Ucucha, per discussion
rem default period after quote; add standard alias for amp
Undid revision 455075076 by [[Special:Contributions/Gadget850|Gadget850]] ([[User talk:Gadget850|talk]]) - this change is causing the display of misformatted references
rem supression of p. and pp. per [[Help talk:Citation Style 1#Page/pages with journal]]
fixed page number spacing, which was incorrectly being treated as excess space by the wiki engine
add newspaper as alias for consistency

  |test={{{Ref|}}}
  |then={{qif
        |test={{booleq

        |else=id="{{{Ref}}}"
        }}
  |else={{qif
        |test={{booland
              |1={{{Last|}}}
              |2={{{Year|}}}
              }}
        |then=id="Reference-{{{Last}}}-{{{Year}}}"
        }}
}}>{{qif
   |test={{{Authorlink|}}}

         |1={{{Authorlink}}}
         |2={{{Author|{{{Last|}}}{{if|{{{First|}}}|, {{{First}}}}}}}}
         }}

  |3=
}}{{if
  |{{{Journal|}}}
  |, ''{{{Journal}}}''
}}{{if
  |{{{Volume|}}}
  |, {{{Volume}}}
}}{{if
  |{{{Issue|}}}
  |({{{Issue}}})
}}{{if
  |{{{Pages|}}}
  |<nowiki>:</nowiki> {{{Pages}}}
}}{{if
  |1={{{ID|}}}
  |2=. {{{ID}}}
}}.</cite><noinclude>
{{esoteric}}
[[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.text:
{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if:{{{authorlink|}}} |[[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}} |{{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} |, {{{first}}} }} |{{{author}}} }}]] |{{#if:{{{last|}}} |{{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} |, {{{first}}} }} |{{{author}}} }} }} }}{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if:{{{coauthors|}}} |, {{{coauthors}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{date|}}} | ({{{date}}}) |{{#if:{{{year|}}} |{{#if:{{{month|}}} | ({{{month}}} {{{year}}}) | ({{{year}}}) }} }} }}{{#if:{{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}{{{year|}}} |. }}{{#if:{{{url|}}} |[{{{url}}} | }} {{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{{title}}}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}{{#if:{{{url|}}} |] | }}{{#if: {{{format|}}} | ({{{format}}}) }}{{#if:{{{journal|}}} |. ''{{{journal}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{volume|}}} | '''{{{volume}}}''' }}{{#if:{{{issue|}}} | ({{{issue}}}) }}{{#if:{{{pages|}}} |: {{{pages}}} }}{{#if: {{{doi|}}} | . [[Digital object identifier|DOI]]:[http://dx.doi.org/{{{doi}}} {{{doi}}}] }}{{#if:{{{id|}}} |. {{{id}}} }}{{#if:{{{accessdate|}}} |. Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]] }}. {{esoteric}} == Usage == {| cellpadding="0" cellspacing="6" ! using first, last !! using author |- width="50%" | 
{{cite journal
 | last = 
 | first = 
 | authorlink = 
 | coauthors = 
 | year = 
 | month = 
 | title = '''REQUIRED'''
 | journal = 
 | volume = 
 | issue = 
 | pages = 
 | doi =
 | id = 
 | url =
 | format = 
 | accessdate = 
 }}
| style="vertical-align: top;" | 
{{cite journal
 | author = 
 | year = 
 | month = 
 | title = '''REQUIRED'''
 | journal = 
 | volume = 
 | issue = 
 | pages = 
 | doi =
 | id = 
 | url = 
 | format = 
 | accessdate = 
 }}
|} * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''authorlink''' works either with '''author''' or with '''last''' & '''first''' to link to the appropriate article (internal link) ** '''coauthors''': allows additional authors * '''date''': ''[[January 1]], [[2006]]''. Full date of publication. ** '''year''': ''2006''. Year of publication (ignored if the ''date'' field is used). *** '''month''': ''January''. Month of publication (ignored if the ''date'' field is used, or if the ''year'' field is ''not'' used). * '''title''': Title of article. '''''This is the only required parameter. All other parameters are optional.''''' * '''journal''': Name of the journal. * '''volume''': Volume number of the journal in which the article is found * '''issue''': Issue number of the journal in which the article is found * '''pages''': ''45–47'': first page, and optional last page. * '''doi''': [[digital object identifier]]. See also {{tl|doi}} * '''id''': Identifier such as ''{{[[:Template:ISSN|ISSN]]|1111-2220}}'', PMID 15128012 **other suitable id-related templates: {{tl|doi}}, {{tl|US patent}} * '''url''': URL of a copy of the article, if available online. ** '''format''': Format, i.e. PDF. Don't specify for HTML (implied as default). * '''accessdate''': Full date when URL was accessed, in [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format, eg. ''2006-02-17''.   |. ''{{{journal}}}''

revision.comment: adding work as an alias for journal param
Archival parameters - copied from Sandbox according to talk page request
Support semicolon as separator - see [[Template talk:Citation]]
fix default separator using a variant of [[User:droll]]'s fix; see [[Template talk:Cite web#Change in default separator and minor bug]]
add support for translated title - see talk
pp and nopp added, per talk
Copy author-mask line from [[Template:Citation]], where it is working... sorry about the initial error.
allow elimination of the last deprecated accessdaymonth and accessmonthday parameters
new author-separator parameter; rm non-functional msm
Check for redundant 'doilabel' parameter to eliminate
Tweak archiving system, per [[Template talk:Citation/core#Error messages]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Citation/core
  |Citation type=Journal
  |AuthorMask = {{{author-mask|{{{authormask|}}}}}}
  |Surname1 = {{{last|{{{surname|{{{last1|{{{surname1|{{{author1|{{{author|{{{authors|{{{author|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname2 = {{{last2|{{{surname2|{{{author2|{{{coauthor|{{{coauthors|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname3 = {{{last3|{{{surname3|{{{author3|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname4 = {{{last4|{{{surname4|{{{author4|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname5 = {{{last5|{{{surname5|{{{author5|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname6 = {{{last6|{{{surname6|{{{author6|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname7 = {{{last7|{{{surname7|{{{author7|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname8 = {{{last8|{{{surname8|{{{author8|}}}}}}}}}
  |Surname9 = {{{last9|{{{surname9|{{{author9|}}}}}}}}}
  |Given1 = {{{first1|{{{given1|{{{first|{{{given|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Given2 = {{{first2|{{{given2|}}}}}}
  |Given3 = {{{first3|{{{given3|}}}}}}
  |Given4 = {{{first4|{{{given4|}}}}}}
  |Given5 = {{{first5|{{{given5|}}}}}}
  |Given6 = {{{first6|{{{given6|}}}}}}
  |Given7 = {{{first7|{{{given7|}}}}}}
  |Given8 = {{{first8|{{{given8|}}}}}}
  |Given9 = {{{first9|{{{given9|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink1 = {{{author-link|{{{author1-link|{{{authorlink|{{{authorlink1|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Authorlink2 = {{{author2-link|{{{authorlink2|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink3 = {{{author3-link|{{{authorlink3|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink4 = {{{author4-link|{{{authorlink4|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink5 = {{{author5-link|{{{authorlink5|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink6 = {{{author6-link|{{{authorlink6|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink7 = {{{author7-link|{{{authorlink7|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink8 = {{{author8-link|{{{authorlink8|}}}}}}
  |Authorlink9 = {{{author9-link|{{{authorlink9|}}}}}}
  |Year={{{year|{{    <!-- attempt to derive year from date, if possible -->
             #if: {{{date|}}}
             |{{
                #iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
                |{{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|einval}}} }}||{{#time:Y|{{{publication-date|}}} }}}}
                |{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}} }}
              }}
             |{{{publication-date|}}} <!-- last resort -->
           }}
        }}}
  |Date = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{{day|}}} {{{month|}}} {{{year|{{{publication-date|}}}}}}}}
  |Title={{{title|}}}
  |TransTitle={{{trans_title|}}}
  |URL={{#if:{{{archiveurl|}}}|{{{archiveurl}}}|{{{url|}}}}} 
  |Series={{{series|{{{version|}}}}}}
  |Periodical = {{{journal|{{{periodical|{{{magazine|{{{work|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |Volume = {{{volume|}}}
  |Issue = {{{issue|{{{number|}}}}}}
  |At = {{
          #if: {{{journal|{{{periodical|{{{magazine|{{{work|}}}}}}}}}}}}
          |{{{pages|{{{page|{{{at|}}}}}}}}}
          |{{
             #if: {{{page|}}}
             |p. {{{page}}}
             |{{
                #if: {{{pages|}}}
                |pp. {{{pages}}}
                |{{{at|}}}
              }}
           }}
        }}
  |IncludedWorkTitle = {{{chapter|{{{contribution|}}}}}}
  |IncludedWorkURL = {{{chapter-url|{{{chapterurl|{{{contribution-url|}}}}}}}}}
  |Edition = {{{edition|}}}
  |Place = {{{place|{{{location|}}}}}}
  |PublicationPlace = {{{publication-place|{{{place|{{{location|}}}}}}}}}
  |Publisher = {{{publisher|}}}
  |PublicationDate = {{{publication-date|}}}
  |EditorSurname1 = {{{editor-last|{{{editor-surname|{{{editor1-last|{{{editor1-surname|{{{editor|{{{editors|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname2 = {{{editor2-last|{{{editor2-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname3 = {{{editor3-last|{{{editor3-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorSurname4 = {{{editor4-last|{{{editor4-surname|}}}}}}
  |EditorGiven1 = {{{editor-first|{{{editor-given|{{{editor1-first|{{{editor1-given|}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |EditorGiven2={{{editor2-first|{{{editor2-given|}}}}}}
  |EditorGiven3={{{editor3-first|{{{editor3-given|}}}}}}
  |EditorGiven4={{{editor4-first|{{{editor4-given|}}}}}}
  |Editorlink1={{{editor-link|{{{editor1-link|}}}}}}
  |Editorlink2={{{editor2-link|}}}
  |Editorlink3={{{editor3-link|}}}
  |Editorlink4={{{editor4-link|}}}
  |Other = {{{others|}}}
  |language = {{{language|{{{in|}}}}}}
  |format = {{{format|}}}
  |ID={{{id|{{{ID|}}}}}}
  |ISBN={{{isbn|{{{ISBN|}}}}}}
  |ISSN={{{issn|{{{ISSN|}}}}}}
  |OCLC={{{oclc|{{{OCLC|}}}}}}
  |PMID={{{pmid|{{{PMID|}}}}}}
  |PMC={{{pmc|{{{PMC|}}}}}}
  |Embargo={{{pmc-embargo-date|1010-10-10}}}
  |Bibcode={{{bibcode|}}}
  |DOI={{{doi|{{{DOI|}}}}}}
  |DoiBroken={{{doi_brokendate|}}}
  |AccessDate={{{access-date|{{{accessdate|}}}}}}
  |OriginalURL={{{url|}}}
  |ArchiveURL={{{archiveurl|}}}
  |ArchiveDate={{{archivedate|}}}
  |laysource = {{{laysource|}}}
  |laysummary = {{{laysummary|}}}
  |laydate = {{{laydate|}}}
  |quote = {{{quote|}}}
  |Ref={{{ref|}}}
  |Sep = {{#ifeq:{{{separator|{{{seperator}}} }}}|;|;|{{{separator|{{{seperator|.}}} }}} }}
  |PS = {{{postscript|.}}}
  |AuthorSep = {{#ifeq:{{{author-separator|}}}|;|;|{{{author-separator|;}}}}} 
  |NameSep = {{{author-name-separator|,}}} 
  |Trunc = {{#if:{{{display-authors|}}}|{{{display-authors}}}|8}}
  |amp = {{{use ampersand before last author|}}}
}}{{#if:{{{accessdaymonth|}}}{{{accessmonthday|}}}{{{accessday|}}}{{{accessmonth|}}}{{{accessyear|}}}{{{day|}}}|[[Category:Cite web templates using unusual accessdate parameters|{{NAMESPACE}} {{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{#if:{{{doilabel|}}}|[[Category:Citation templates using redundant parameters|{{NAMESPACE}} {{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Pp-template|small=yes}}
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: treat blank url the same as undefined; requested on talk page
remove redundancy: PMC is already passed to core separately; no need to also put it in the URL
add support for deadurl parameter, per request on talk page
undo change by Ucucha, per discussion
rem default period after quote; add standard alias for amp
rem supression of p. and pp. per [[Help talk:Citation Style 1#Page/pages with journal]]
fixed page number spacing, which was incorrectly being treated as excess space by the wiki engine
add newspaper as alias for consistency
